summary: P1 self-contradicting closest-vs-furthest clause closed by EXP-276 P1 swap2 rewrite. New text states 123,200 km / 48.6× consistent with the 2042/42 R_p factor (Canary, the most distant station) instead of the prior wording that said "closest min-distance" but cited the furthest-station ratio.
note: See EXP-276 expansion file for full replacement_html (full_section_replacement of #p4-427-station-coverage).
